reasoning: 8x zoom reveals three notable artifacts. (1) Asymmetry: the two top lobes of the heart have visibly different pixel staircase profiles — left lobe is smoother than right, a classic AI bilateral-symmetry failure. (2) Color bleed: green pixels contaminate the pink/white border ring in a scattered, non-pattern way; at this zoom level clean pixel art should have sharp color borders unless dithering is intentional, but the green distribution does not follow a consistent dither pattern. (3) Inconsistent outline: border thickness alternates between 1px and 2px segments in a non-deliberate fashion, especially on the lower-left curve. Positive notes: no sub-pixel interpolation ghosts, no AA halos against the dark background, the blue interior reads as intentional flat fill, and the checkered pink/white motif is a recognizable pixel-art decorative choice. Net assessment: the asymmetry and color bleed are clear AI tells; outline inconsistency is minor. Does not meet a clean pass but is recognizable as a heal VFX heart.
